meta.title: Quiz
meta.description: How much do you know about everyday civic awareness and responsible living?

questions.q: What is the best habit while walking on roads without footpaths?
opts: Walk in the middle of the road
questions.exp: Walking facing traffic helps you stay aware of oncoming vehicles and react quickly.

questions.q: Why should you avoid littering in public places?
opts: It increases cleaning costs and pollution
questions.exp: Littering harms the environment, increases pollution, and makes public spaces unhealthy.

questions.q: What is a good way to reduce noise pollution?
questions.exp: Avoiding unnecessary honking helps reduce noise pollution and keeps communities peaceful.

questions.q: What is the best practice for saving electricity?
opts: Switch off appliances when not in use
questions.exp: Switching off unused appliances saves energy and reduces environmental impact.

questions.q: Why is spitting in public a bad habit?
questions.exp: Spitting can spread germs and create unhygienic conditions in shared spaces.
Responsible parking ensures smooth traffic flow and avoids inconvenience to others.

questions.q: How can you contribute to a cleaner environment?
opts: Use public bins and reduce waste
questions.exp: Proper waste disposal and reducing waste help maintain clean and healthy surroundings.

questions.q: What is a good civic habit regarding animals?
questions.exp: Being kind and responsible towards animals reflects strong civic awareness.
